id.description: The user's ID, acting as the primary key for their candle data.

candles_data.description: A JSON array of candle objects. Each object has an ID and a path array of {x,y,z,timestamp} objects.

database.instructions: This database stores paths of candles placed by users in a 3D ocean. Each user has a single record, identified by their user ID. The 'candles_data' field contains all information about their candles, including historical positions to trace their paths.
